channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: PlayStation : Sony annonce la fin des jeux physiques
item.description: À partir du mois de janvier 2028, tous les nouveaux jeux PlayStation que vous achèterez ne seront plus disponibles qu’en format numérique. Sony va cesser petit à petit de proposer des jeux sur disque.

item.title: Fin des disques PlayStation en 2028 : la PS6 sans lecteur
item.description: Sony arrête de presser des disques pour ses nouveaux jeux à partir de janvier 2028. Traduction : la future PS6 a de fortes chances d'arriver sans lecteur, ou avec un lecteur devenu accessoire.

item.title: Les offres se multiplient côté smartphones : les 13 deals à retenir à la 2e démarque des soldes
item.description: Les prix des smartphones dégringolent encore d'un cran avec l'arrivée de la 2e démarque des soldes. C'est le moment idéal pour changer de téléphone au meilleur prix, que ce soit du haut de gamme ou un modèle plus abordable.

item.title: How to tune into Gaeilge's 2026 online – it's *FREE*
item.description: Here's how to watch BBC Gaeilge's summer 2026 lineup online from anywhere in the world, completely FREE.

item.title: This new tool can let you ask Claude if that 'too good to be true' online offer is actually a scam
item.description: Norton's scam detection will let you ask Claude whether an email or online deal looks suspicious without leaving the AI chatbot.

item.title: What is the release date for Silo season 3 on Apple TV?
item.description: Silo season 3 returns to Apple TV in July. Here's what you need to know about the sci-fi show's return.

item.title: A new EV price war begins — Dacia slashes price of the Spring by £4k to again make it the 'most affordable new car on the market'
item.description: Dacia slashes price of the Spring to reclaim UK’s cheapest car title, as the small EV price war begins.

item.title: Sony is killing all physical PlayStation game discs
item.description: Sony has announced that from January 2028 it will entirely stop the production of physical discs for new PlayStation games. From that point onwards, new releases will only be available in digital versions, or physical copies with a download code in the box. Games released before January 2028 will still be available on disc. "This […]

item.title: Astrophotographie : comment réussir ses photos d’un ciel étoilé ?
item.description: Le ciel étoilé est un terrain de jeu fascinant pour tout photographe créatif. Il faut dire que la voûte céleste sait se montrer spectaculaire. Alors, comment réussir à photographier les étoiles ? C'est ce qu'on va vous expliquer dans ce dossier complet.

item.title: UN report says policymakers are struggling to keep up with pace of AI development
item.description: UN panel says 'AI is neither inherently good nor bad,' but better safeguards around it are needed.

item.title: Google built a great smart speaker, but Gemini isn’t ready for it
item.description: Smart speakers have spent the past few years searching for a compelling second act. Beyond music, timers, and controlling your lights, they've struggled to justify taking up space on the kitchen counter. AI promised to change that. Amazon debuted its new hardware powered by a revamped Alexa last fall, and now it's finally Google's turn. […]

item.title: Rhythm Heaven never misses a beat
item.description: Rhythm Heaven isn't Nintendo's best-known series, nor its most prolific. Prior to the launch of Rhythm Heaven Groove on the Switch this week - it's out on July 2nd - there were only four previous entries, one of which was exclusive to Japan. The most recent came out more than a decade ago. Even still, […]

item.title: I launched my amphibious friends to the beat in Rhythm Heaven Groove — it’s a great continuation of what came before and a wonderfully whimsical time on Nintendo Switch
item.description: Rhythm Heaven Groove is another charming series entry packed with unorthodox yet enticing level design and memorable music.

item.title: Nvidia says it can cut data center water use. The AI boom has a bigger problem
item.description: Hotter-running liquid cooling could reduce the need for evaporative cooling on-site. But the facilities’ appetite for electricity still carries a large hidden water footprint. Data centers, in case you haven’t heard, have a water problem.

item.title: Belgique – Sénégal : à quelle heure et sur quelle chaîne regarder ce 16e de finale de la Coupe du monde 2026 ?
item.description: La Belgique affronte le Sénégal ce mercredi 1er juillet 2026 pour un 16e de finale de la Coupe du monde 2026. Bonne nouvelle : le match est diffusé gratuitement sur M6, mais aussi sur beIN Sports 1 pour les abonnés. Voici tout ce qu'il faut savoir pour le suivre en direct.

item.title: Fable was easily one of the best things I saw at Summer Game Fest 2026, and I can’t wait to explore all of its rabbit holes and meet all its talking pigs
item.description: I still can’t get over Fable’s enormous potential and branching possibilities, along with its madcap cast of full-fledged NPCs

item.title: The Best Automatic Litter Box of 2026: Petkit and Litter-Robot
item.description: With these high-tech automatic litter boxes, gone are the days of scooping and smells. Welcome to the future.

item.title: Des ransomwares exploitent une faille de Microsoft Defender pour pirater les ordinateurs Windows
item.description: Une faille de sécurité dans Microsoft Defender met en danger les ordinateurs Windows. Corrigée en avril dernier, la vulnérabilité est activement exploitée par des pirates armés de ransomwares. L'agence fédérale américaine de cybersécurité exhorte désormais particuliers et entreprises à installer sans délai les correctifs de Microsoft pour contrer les hackers....

item.title: I test camera gear for a living — here are the 5 standout models for 2026 so far, from Sony, Lumix and more
item.description: I look back at the best cameras I've reviewed so far this year, and select my personal 5 favorites.

item.title: DeLonghi has expanded its espresso machine lineup — where to buy Classic Matte Black and Classic Stainless Steel
item.description: De’Longhi has launched two new Classic Espresso Machine models in Matte Black ($149.95) and Stainless Steel ($179.95).

item.title: Amazon is spending billions on deploying engineers into customers looking to get started with AI
item.description: AWS' Forward Deployed Engineers will reside inside customer organizations to build and implement AI tools at scale.

item.title: Anthropic’s Fable 5 is back after US shutdown it called 'a misunderstanding'
item.description: Anthropic’s most advanced public Claude model is returning after a US government directive forced it offline — but the episode raises bigger questions about who controls access to frontier AI.

item.title: Keke Palmers podcast interview with Michelle Buteau is pure joy
item.description: If you're looking for a joyous hour, watch Keke Palmer interviewing Michelle Buteau.

item.title: Getty Images is canceling its $3.7 billion Shutterstock merger due to UK restrictions
item.description: Getty Images has moved to terminate a $3.7 billion merger with rival Shutterstock due to restrictions imposed by UK regulators.

item.title: Ce casque gaming de Corsair est vendu à moitié prix pour les soldes sur Amazon
item.description: Au prix fort, le Corsair Virtuoso Max Wireless peinait à cacher ses défauts. Grâce à Amazon, le casque perd la moitié de son prix et devient bien plus intéressant.

item.title: Nanoleaf’s new ceiling light isn’t a show-stopper like the Philips Skylight, but it wins on the smart home features front — and it’s more affordable
item.description: Nanoleaf's new ceiling light is small but ever so smart, and it's a lot cheaper than the new Philips Skylight.

item.title: Lectric XPress2 Review (2026): A Heavy-Duty but Nimble Ebike
item.description: This hefty but nimble and highly customizable ebike makes the journey as important as the destination. Get where you want, and have fun along the way.

item.title: Range anxiety
item.description: The storm developed quickly over west central Illinois on April 17th, first as a single high-intensity system called a supercell, and then later that evening transforming into a long squall line of thunderstorms. Tucked inside a wall of wind were several smaller, quick-forming tornadoes, one of which landed directly on Rivian’s electric vehicle factory on […]...

item.title: Drive Slower, Save Money on Gas. Thanks, Physics!
item.description: Planning a Fourth of July getaway? Use less gas—and cut your emissions—by easing up on the pedal.

item.title: The cube was a lie: up close with our Dbrand Companion Cube before it gets destroyed
item.description: Dbrand is the company that shipped a product that told Nintendo's legal team to "go fuck yourself," and the company that had a second set of lawyer-dodging PS5 plates ready when Sony threatened to sue over the originals. But on June 29th, the company finally ate some serious humble pie, canceling its Portal-themed Companion Cube […]

item.title: What is the release date for Rick and Morty season 9 episode 7 on Adult Swim, HBO Max, and Hulu?
item.description: The continued vagueness of episode synopses means that literally anything can happen. But when is Rick and Morty season 9 episode 7 coming to a streaming platform near you?

item.title: Inside the $9 billion Texas startup building a drone armada for the U.S. Navy
item.description: Founded by a former Navy SEAL, Saronic has $2.6 billion in funding, $500 million in government contracts, and a bold vision for how fleets of drone boats will reshape warfare and American industry. It was September 2022, and Dino Mavrookas was trying to build the future of U.S. naval power atop an $800 dinghy.

item.title: Meet the creator tracking outlandish claims from AI executives every day
item.description: Brian Patrick’s ‘AI Executive Insanity Series’ on social media breaks down some of the wildest claims being made by tech leaders about AI. When Brian Patrick wakes up each day, he logs on to his computer and starts combing through social media, news articles, and YouTube videos to find the craziest things prominent AI executives have ever said. He always finds something....

item.title: Base44 no-code review
item.description: A no-code solution for web apps, agents, and more.

item.title: Pourquoi la puce Sohu d’Etched menace le monopole de Nvidia
item.description: Une jeune boîte américaine annonce qu'elle va faire trembler Nvidia. On a déjà entendu ça, souvent, et ça finit rarement bien. Sauf que cette fois, quelques détails méritent qu'on s'y arrête.

item.title: Legos Technic Planet Earth and Moon in Orbit has dropped below $65 at Amazon — save over $10
item.description: As of July 1, the Lego Technic Planet Earth and Moon in Orbit set is discounted to $61.99 at Amazon. That's 17% off its list price of $74.99.

item.title: Vercel v0 no-code review
item.description: Can anyone code with Vercel v0?

item.title: How to watch Sierra vs. Gauff online for free
item.description: How to watch Wimbledon for free. Live stream Sierra vs. Gauff in Wimbledon 2026 for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Un « calvaire kafkaïen » : Amazon est accusé d’avoir fait vivre un enfer « aux victimes d’usurpation d’identité »
item.description: Amazon a été sanctionné par la FTC pour ne pas avoir aidé des victimes d'usurpation d'identité sur sa plateforme. Le géant de e-commerce écope d’une amende de 2,25 millions de dollars. Les victimes devaient notamment deviner le nom de l'arnaqueur pour que ses données bancaires soient supprimées du compte frauduleux.

item.title: Who decides when a cyber AI tool is safe to deploy?
item.description: As AI cyber threats grow, organizations need trained teams, not just stronger tools.

item.title: How to watch Sabalenka vs. Kessler online for free
item.description: How to watch Wimbledon for free. Live stream Sabalenka vs. Kessler in Wimbledon 2026 for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How to watch Tsitsipas vs. Djokovic online for free
item.description: How to watch Wimbledon for free. Live stream Tsitsipas vs. Djokovic in Wimbledon 2026 for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Ray-Ban Meta : la fonction d’amplification audio devient payante au-delà de 3 heures par mois
item.description: Meta va limiter Conversation Focus, une fonction de ses lunettes connectées, à trois heures par mois pour ceux qui ne paient pas d'abonnement.

item.title: How to watch Sinner vs. Borges online for free
item.description: How to watch Wimbledon for free. Live stream Sinner vs. Borges in Wimbledon 2026 for free from anywhere in the world.
